turns.speaker: caller
turns.text: Hi, I have a Max Bupa policy — uh, I think they rebranded it to Niva Bupa now. Do you accept that?

turns.speaker: agent
turns.text: Yes, Niva Bupa — formerly Max Bupa — is part of our network. Cashless facility is available for most of their plans.

turns.speaker: caller
turns.text: Great. I'm planning a cataract surgery. Will that be covered?

turns.speaker: agent
turns.text: Cataract surgery is generally covered under Niva Bupa's inpatient plans. However, some policies have waiting periods for pre-existing conditions. Please check your policy document or call Niva Bupa to confirm your specific eligibility.

turns.speaker: caller
turns.text: Makes sense. And how do I initiate the cashless process?

turns.speaker: agent
turns.text: You'll need a pre-authorisation from Niva Bupa before the procedure. Our insurance desk will coordinate that for you. Please visit us a day or two before the scheduled surgery with your health card and doctor's admission advice.

turns.speaker: caller
turns.text: Perfect. I'll do that. Thank you.
